summary: The diff implements a React/TypeScript SPA using TanStack Router, Tailwind CSS, and Lucide icons — not the requested HTML/CSS/Bootstrap 5/vanilla JavaScript stack. All 35+ pages are present as React components, and most functional requirements (cart, forms, categories, blog, etc.) appear implemented. However, the fundamental technology constraint is violated, and several specific acceptance criteria details need evaluation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Use only HTML, CSS, Bootstrap 5, and vanilla JavaScript — no React, Vue, or other JS frameworks
missing_requirements.reason: The entire implementation uses React (TSX components), TanStack Router, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript instead of plain HTML, Bootstrap 5, and vanilla JavaScript. This violates the core technology constraint stated in the build request.

missing_requirements.requirement: Image carousel on Home hero banner that auto-advances and supports manual navigation
missing_requirements.reason: The Home page file is not shown in the visible diff content (omitted due to limits). No carousel implementation is visible in any of the shown files. The hero banner carousel with auto-advance and manual navigation cannot be confirmed from the available diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate and integrate static image assets: FreshCart logo (freshcart-logo.dim_300x80.png), hero banner background (hero-banner.dim_1440x560.png), and product placeholder (product-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows 43 added files but 23 were omitted due to limits. The image asset files are referenced in code but none of the actual image files are visible in the diff summary, so their generation cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Bootstrap 5 grid system for responsive layout with sticky navbar using Bootstrap 5 classes
missing_requirements.reason: Tailwind CSS utility classes are used instead of Bootstrap 5 grid system and components throughout the codebase.

hallucinated_features.description: React and TypeScript SPA with TanStack Router instead of multi-page HTML files
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly requires plain HTML pages with Bootstrap 5 and vanilla JavaScript. The implementation uses React, TypeScript, TanStack Router, and a Vite-based SPA architecture, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Tailwind CSS used instead of Bootstrap 5
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies Bootstrap 5 for styling and layout. The implementation uses Tailwind CSS with OKLCH custom properties and utility classes throughout.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity and ICP authentication integration with useInternetIdentity and useActor hooks
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists backend user authentication as a non-goal. The implementation includes Internet Computer Protocol authentication hooks and an InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the app.
The build request specifies no backend or database integration. A Motoko actor file was added indicating a backend canister was created.

hallucinated_features.description: Wishlist page added beyond the 35 required pages
hallucinated_features.reason: A Wishlist page is imported and routed in App.tsx but was not listed among the required pages in REQ-4.

hallucinated_features.description: TanStack Query (React Query) integrated for data fetching
hallucinated_features.reason: QueryClient and QueryClientProvider are used in main.tsx. No data fetching library was requested; the build request calls for client-side only interactivity with vanilla JavaScript.
